_comment: Generated fixture: real Selena-compiled drop.sel WGSL + host binding descriptor (bindings.Layout), used by client/js/runtime.test.js to drive the drop feedback-compute kernel through the generic descriptor-driven Selena WebGPU compute path against a validating fake GPUDevice. Regenerate by re-running selena.Compile on shaders/jeantimex-water.selena/drop.sel (TargetWGSL) if drop.sel changes. Source: examples/gosx-docs/app/demos/water/shaders/jeantimex-water.selena/drop.sel
